name: The Haunted Mansion
description: A classic text adventure set in a mysterious haunted mansion. Explore the rooms, collect items, and uncover the secrets within.
author: TextGame Engine

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.description: You are standing in a grand entrance hall. The marble floor gleams in the dim light.

rooms.name: Library
rooms.description: You are in a dusty library. Books line the walls from floor to ceiling.

rooms.name: Garden
rooms.description: You are in a peaceful garden. Flowers bloom everywhere and birds chirp softly.

rooms.name: Cellar
rooms.description: You are in a dark, damp cellar. The air smells of mold and old wine.

items.name: key
items.description: A small brass key with intricate engravings.
items.useDescription: The key fits into a lock somewhere.

items.name: lamp
items.description: An old oil lamp. It might still work.
items.useDescription: The lamp flickers to life, illuminating the area.

items.name: statue
items.description: A heavy marble statue of a lion.
items.useDescription: The statue is too heavy to move.

items.name: book
items.description: An ancient tome with strange symbols on the cover.
items.useDescription: As you open the book, the symbols seem to shimmer.
